name: Baci Di Dama ( Orange Almond Cookies )
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the ground almonds with the sugar, orange peel, and all but 1 tablespoon of the flour.
2. Stir in enough milk until the mixture forms a smooth, firm dough.
3. Roll the dough into small balls and place them on a baking sheet lined with greased wax paper, spacing them well apart.
4. Sprinkle the remaining flour over the cookies.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.
7. When cooled, sandwich the cookies together with the melted chocolate.
8. Chill in the fridge for 1 hour before serving.
Makes 12-15
